query: Pacific Northwest Loppet Series cross country ski race Various venues

videos.title: First Annual Moose Dewlap Citizens Trek Nordic Ski
videos.description:
GPS Trail Map: http://www.movescount.com/moves/move53714077

Replacing the classic Hog Loppet with a new format in the Moose Loppet aspires to be the new standard cross-country trek event in the Leavenworth Area.  

In the Lake Wenatchee Fish Lake snow park the course winds along the Chiwawa river through forested trails as it slowly begins to climb more steeply.  Views open up across the Cascades to meadows below and peaks in the distance.  

Well equipped with multiple aid stations for recharging before the long decent at the half-way point.

This lollypop loop finishes back at the start.  The course sheltered from high-winds and avalanche danger is a welcome new tradition to NW Nordic skiing. 


------------------------------------------------------------
BOTNW Web: http://bestofthenw.org/

Follow Us
Twitter:  @Best_of_the_NW

Like Us
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bestofthenw

Subscribe 
You Tube Channel: http://www.youtube.com/user/bryanschaeffer

videos.title: Inga's First Skijor in Two Years - 1-18-2016
videos.description: Today was Inga's first time skijoring in two years!  During the winter of 2014 she was diagnosed with a cruciate ligament tear and had surgery (TPLO) in Feb 2014, so she never played in the snow that winter.  Last winter (2014-2015) was the lowest snow year on record in the Pacific Northwest, and there was never enough snow to even ski on, except in the Methow Valley.  So we skied with her once there, but no skijoring, just running alongside us.  We wondered how she would react today -- she was actually anxious to get her harness on, and took off as soon as Mike was on his skis!
